  "themes": [
    {"id": "T1", "bar_start": 1, "bar_end": 5, "description": "Opening theme in C# minor; long bass pedal tones beneath continuous triplet broken-chord accompaniment in the right hand; sighing melodic figure in the upper register."},
    {"id": "T2", "bar_start": 5, "bar_end": 9, "description": "Lyrical second theme in E major (relative major); cantabile melody over triplet accompaniment, featuring a sustained melodic line with characteristic upper-voice ornament."},
    {"id": "T1a", "bar_start": 9, "bar_end": 15, "description": "Return of T1 material in C# minor with modal inflection (G natural); harmonic darkening through borrowed chords from C# Phrygian/C natural minor."},
    {"id": "T3", "bar_start": 15, "bar_end": 21, "description": "New lyrical passage centered on B minor; features sustained bass pedal on B with expressive melodic line; sequential motion through relative and subdominant key areas."},
    {"id": "T4", "bar_start": 21, "bar_end": 28, "description": "Transitional theme moving through F# minor; ascending sequential figuration in inner voice, building toward dominant preparation of C# minor."},
    {"id": "Dev", "bar_start": 28, "bar_end": 42, "description": "Extended development-like passage prolonging G# minor as dominant of C# minor; features dramatic melodic ascent, chromatic voice-leading, ornamental figures, and prolonged dominant pedal culminating in return."},
    {"id": "T1b", "bar_start": 42, "bar_end": 60, "description": "Recapitulation of T1 and T2 material in C# minor and E major respectively; slight variations in inner-voice figuration and harmonic intensification leading to coda."},
    {"id": "Coda", "bar_start": 60, "bar_end": 69, "description": "Extended coda in C# minor; prolonged dominant pedal on G# with increasingly dense texture; final resolution to tonic with fermata on the concluding C# minor chord; ends attacca."}
  ]
